title: Job Opening Category Manager at Fire-Boltt International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Fire-Boltt International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Fire-Boltt International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fire-Boltt International Enterprises:
Fire-Boltt International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt International Enterprises!
